title: 🧱 Broken Oath Geometries
name: Broken Oath Geometries
what_it_is: Geometry disrupted by betrayal—forms that once held sacred alignment but now fracture under the weight of broken promises.
how_to_use: his betrayal cracks the oath structure—geometry destabilizes in sacred disarray
her temple tilts—truth dislodged from its axiomatic base
animation_behavior: Structures vibrate with tension, pieces drift apart, sacred shapes shatter at key words ---
